home.p: This rebuilt site keeps the old site’s core structure and key sections: announcements, admissions, academics & regulations, faculty, exchange/dual degree, downloads, and contact. The language switch updates the whole site in sync.

tiles.d: Application timeline, interviews, scholarships, and international admissions.
Curriculum structure, graduation requirements, and resources.

announcements.p: A curated list based on the old homepage announcements (you can add categories, pinning, search, and pagination).

about.intro.p: Program positioning, highlights, and learning environment.

about.features.p: Showcase global curriculum, faculty strengths, industry links, alumni, and rankings/accreditations.

about.rules.p: Organize study regulations, course selection, thesis/project, credit transfer, etc.

admissions.p: Admissions information including MBA admissions and scholarships (add international admissions details as needed).

mba.p: Application timeline, interviews, requirements, and reminders.

scholarships.p: Scholarship/financial aid options and application information.

academics.p: Academics information including curriculum and study regulations.

curriculum.p: Course map, required/elective courses, credits, graduation requirements, and policies.

faculty.p: Faculty list, research areas, contact, and profile links.

guide.p: FAQ, admin processes, learning resources, and student life tips.

graduation.p: Requirements, check-out process, forms, and reminders.

downloads.p: Central place for frequently used forms. Add real file links from the old site.
